Program

Medical imaging methods and the devices used in this field aim to examine the internal structure of the body with various techniques and to increase the support offered to the physician. It is possible for medical imaging methods to reach their goal efficiently with the presence of a well-trained team in the field. There is always a need for health personnel who can provide use in parallel with the developing technology in the light of the information they will acquire during the training period.

For this purpose, in addition to theoretical training, students are provided with the opportunity to progress simultaneously with field applications and interactive training in the laboratory. In the Radiological Applications Laboratory available at our university, it is used in the application stages of basic department courses such as Radiological Imaging Methods I and II in the curriculum in order to provide information about the devices. It is used to improve the knowledge, skills and abilities of students about Radiological Applications.

In the world of health, since it is always aimed to ensure that people benefit from the highest level of opportunities and continue their lives in a healthy way, the support of the personnel using the devices together with the devices to health and physicians is important.

Radiological Applications Laboratory Equipment

SIEMENS Mammomat 1000 Mammography Simulator Device

Dynamıc X-Ray (DRX FIXED 6) X-ray Simulator Device

Note:

There is no radiation emission in the two simulator devices in the laboratory. Prepared for educational purposes.

Qualifications of Medical Imaging Technicians

They need to perform radiological examinations with the most appropriate shooting protocols. For this, it is advantageous to have an interest in technical devices, computers and other automation devices. They are expected to be people with a strong sense of responsibility who can help people at all times, as they may work day and night in the form of shifts.
